channel.title: Teach With AI
channel.description: Recent content on Teach With AI

item.description:
-–

## title: “About”

# About

I started this site because I was frustrated by sponsored AI tool lists that never explained how the tools actually worked in real classrooms.

This website provides practical, beginner-friendly reviews, tutorials, and comparisons focused on helping teachers save time.

Whether you’re a classroom teacher, tutor, curriculum coordinator, or school leader, you’ll find actionable guides designed to help you use AI effectively.

My goal is simple: test tools, explain them clearly, and help educators make informed decisions.

-–

title: “Contact”

-–

# Contact

Have an AI tool that teachers should know about?

Feel free to reach out.

Teachers are welcome to share tools, ideas, and classroom experiences.

Companies interested in reviews or partnerships may also contact us.

Email:

hello@marwandeals.com

-–

title: “Best AI Tools for Lesson Planning in 2026”

date: 2026-06-09

draft: false

slug: “best-ai-tools-lesson-planning”

description: “Save hours every week with these 5 best AI tools for lesson planning in 2026. Honest reviews, free options, and exactly what each tool does best.”

categories: [“AI for Lesson Planning”]

tags: [“lesson planning”, “AI tools”, “free tools”, “MagicSchool”, “teachers”]

-–

Planning lessons takes more time than it should. Between aligning to curriculum
